response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the provided Japanese lyrics for the song 'Kokoro Puzzle Rhythm'. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was used for the musical performance. Manual transcription and translation were performed for the post-performance talk segment and on-screen text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously anchored to vocal onset. Aggressive truncation was applied during the song's faster sections to prevent cascading delays. The transition between the song and the studio talk was handled with a clear break in subtitles.

subtitles.original: ココロパズルリズム
subtitles.english: [Song: Kokoro Puzzle Rhythm]

subtitles.original:
vocal: 儒烏風亭らでん
illustration: ちぼみるく
subtitles.english:
Vocal: Jofutei Raden
Illustration: Chibomiru

subtitles.original:
mix: 赤ティン
movie: 金子開発
subtitles.english:
Mix: Akatin
Movie: Kaneko Kaihatsu

subtitles.original: これからの未来 ほらたくさんのピース
subtitles.english: In this future, look at all the pieces

subtitles.original: 組み立てるのはキミしだい
subtitles.english: It's up to you to put them together

subtitles.original: 一つずつの明日を生きる
subtitles.english: Living each tomorrow one by one

subtitles.original: ココロのパズルとリズム
subtitles.english: The puzzle and rhythm of the heart

subtitles.original: うまくは言えないけど
subtitles.english: I can't say it well, but the feeling

subtitles.original: 不思議と安心していられる感覚って
subtitles.english: Of being strangely at peace

subtitles.original: まるでパズルみたいだ
subtitles.english: It's just like a puzzle

subtitles.original: もうずっと前から僕らは予約席
subtitles.english: We've had reserved seats for a long time

subtitles.original: さあ両手つないで
subtitles.english: Come on, hold both hands

subtitles.original: きっと一つになれる
subtitles.english: And we can surely become one

subtitles.original: 完成が見えていても
subtitles.english: Even if you can see it's complete

subtitles.original: すんなりとはいかないね
subtitles.english: It doesn't go smoothly, does it?

subtitles.original: ライブをご覧になっている皆様、こんばんは！
subtitles.english: Good evening to everyone watching the live stream!

subtitles.original: ライブの途中ではございますが、
subtitles.english: We're in the middle of the live performance,

subtitles.original: ここでらでんの小噺美術解説のお時間です！
subtitles.english: but it's time for Raden's little art commentary!

subtitles.original: 今回ご紹介するのは...
subtitles.english: The piece I'll be introducing today is...
